'''yamuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iapygid|iapygid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-m-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iapygid|iapygid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yamuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæmiwith|yæmiwith]] || [[word:yæmiwij|yæmiwij]] || [[word:yæmiwish|yæmiwish]] || [[word:yæmiwi|yæmiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yamumuwuth|yamumuwuth]] || [[word:yamumuwuj|yamumuwuj]] || [[word:yamumuwush|yamumuwush]] || [[word:yamumuwu|yamumuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yamuwuth|yamuwuth]] || [[word:yamuwuj|yamuwuj]] || [[word:yamuwush|yamuwush]] || [[word:yamuwu|yamuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yamufwuth|yamufwuth]] || [[word:yamufwuj|yamufwuj]] || [[word:yamufwush|yamufwush]] || [[word:yamufwuf|yamufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yamuwuthu|yamuwuthu]] || [[word:yamuwuju|yamuwuju]] || [[word:yamuwushu|yamuwushu]] || [[word:yamuwuku|yamuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yamuwuth|yamuwuth]] || [[word:yamuwuj|yamuwuj]] || [[word:yamuwush|yamuwush]] || [[word:yamuwu|yamuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yamuwuthul|yamuwuthul]] || [[word:yamuwujul|yamuwujul]] || [[word:yamuwushul|yamuwushul]] || [[word:yamuwukul|yamuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yamuwuthuthu|yamuwuthuthu]] || [[word:yamuwujuju|yamuwujuju]] || [[word:yamuwushushu|yamuwushushu]] || [[word:yamuwuku|yamuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yamuwuthun|yamuwuthun]] || [[word:yamuwujun|yamuwujun]] || [[word:yamuwushun|yamuwushun]] || [[word:yamuwukun|yamuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yamuwuthuoro|yamuwuthuoro]] || [[word:yamuwujuoro|yamuwujuoro]] || [[word:yamuwushuoro|yamuwushuoro]] || [[word:yamuwukuoro|yamuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
